summary: Completed comprehensive testing of M9 Alerts feature (Reminders for Missing Attendance and Missing Work Reports). All backend APIs working correctly (100% pass rate - 15/15 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with proper role-based access, notification bell, reminders page with tabs, and dashboard widgets.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge doesn't immediately update after marking notifications as read on NotificationsPage - requires waiting for 60s poll cycle
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add a React context or event system to trigger NotificationBell refresh when mark-read is called

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@begwork.com / admin123
Tech user login with tech2@begwork.com / tech123
Dashboard shows Missing Attendance and Missing Reports widgets for managers
Reminders nav link visible in sidebar for Admin role
NotificationBell in header sidebar
Notification badge shows unread count correctly
Reminders page (/reminders) loads with 3 tabs: Missing Attendance, Missing Reports, Reminder Log
Reminders page shows summary cards with counts
Reminders page tables show data correctly
Send reminder API creates notifications for users (tested both backend and UI)
Notifications page (/notifications) shows user's notifications with CTA buttons
Notification shows 'Fill Report' CTA for MissingWorkReport type
Mark all read API works correctly (verified via API)
GET /api/reminders/policy returns policy settings
GET /api/reminders/missing-attendance returns list of users
GET /api/reminders/missing-work-reports returns list of users with projects
GET /api/reminders/logs returns reminder logs with status
POST /api/reminders/send creates notifications
POST /api/reminders/excuse marks reminder as excused
GET /api/notifications/my returns user notifications with unread count
POST /api/notifications/mark-read marks all notifications as read
POST /api/internal/run-reminder-jobs triggers scheduler
action_items: Optional: Add event/context to refresh NotificationBell count when mark-read is called from NotificationsPage

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All core functionality working, minor badge refresh UX issue)

seed_data_creation: Test used existing seed users: admin@begwork.com, tech2@begwork.com. Backend tests created test reminder entries and notifications.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M9 Alerts feature fully functional. NotificationBell component fetches unread count via polling (60s interval). Reminders page has 3 tabs: Missing Attendance, Missing Reports, Reminder Log. Dashboard shows widgets for managers. Notifications page shows CTA buttons (Mark Attendance / Fill Report). Auto-resolve works when attendance is marked or report is submitted.
